'''Peter McConnell''' is a [[Wikipedia:Video game music|video game music]] [[Wikipedia:Composer|composer]] who works for [[LucasArts]]. He has worked on video games, usually with other sound specialists like [[Michael Land]] and [[Clint Bajakian]]. Land, McConnell and [[Justin Graham]] are responsible for the evolution of the [[iMUSE]] system.<ref name="RA">''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault: The Official Insider's Guide]]''</ref>

He participated to the team of ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault]]'' with Land and Bajakian. Among other things he extracted the sound effects ([[laser]] blasts, [[R2-D2]]'s whistles) from the [[Skywalker Sound]] database in order to be used into the game.<ref name="RA" />

He also provided the voice of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] in [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader|''Rogue Squadron II'']].

{{Bio-stub}}
